user.title: Contact Energy Setup
user.description:
Configure your Contact Energy integration.

After clicking Submit, the integration will be created and data downloading will begin. Be aware that Contact Energy can take 24-72 hours to display the most recent energy usage data. Also, it may take several hours before historical data is scraped and displayed in Home Assistant.

data.usage_days: Initial number of days' usage to download

data_description.email: Your Contact Energy account email address
data_description.usage_days: Number of days of historical data to download initially (1-100)

contract.title: Select Contract
contract.description: Choose which electricity contract to monitor

abort.already_configured: Integration already configured for this contract
